rulings.Case Title: XELAN PROP I LLC VS. MARIA MARANGHI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, September 26, 2014, Line 9: DEFENDANT MARTHA BINI's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons: DENIED. Complaint and Notice sufficiently allege unlawful detainer per CCP 1161(3) and SFRO 37.9(3). Defendnats' counsel is ordered again to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. See CUD-13-643869 April 16, 2013 minute order; CUD-13-646185 November 12, 2013 Minute Order; CUD-14-647799 March 26, 2014 Minute Order. Failure to comply with the SFLR 2.6B and 2.6C may result in motion being taken off calendar. (501/REQ) - late tentative
